summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Resonance music streaming app. All 15 pytest backend tests passed, WebSocket party sync verified with real WS client, and all requested frontend flows (auth, home, player, library, friends, parties, admin) work end-to-end.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject '*' with credentials; currently works only because frontend hits same-origin via ingress. Set explicit origins for production robustness.
Cookie set with samesite='none' + secure=True. Fine for cross-site; ensure production always uses HTTPS.

action_items: (Optional) Tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit list of allowed origins instead of '*' when using allow_credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~630 lines - approaching split threshold; consider modularizing routers (auth/songs/parties/friends) into separate files for maintainability.
Login query builds mobile fallback '___' when identifier has no digits - works but relies on that sentinel never matching. Cleaner to conditionally add mobile clause.
Party WebSocket handler reads party doc twice for queue_remove/queue_move; consider atomic Mongo updates or optimistic locking for high concurrency.
No rate limiting or brute-force lockout on /auth/login (playbook mentions 5-attempt lockout). Not blocking, but flagged.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@resonance.app / Admin@1234. Test users created dynamically per-run with random suffix (uix_a_*, uix_b_*, tuser_a_*, tuser_b_*) - not cleaned up but harmless.
seed_data_creation: None persisted beyond dynamically-registered test users; admin-uploaded TEST_Song_* is deleted at end of test_admin_upload_and_delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). WS sync test at /app/backend/tests/ws_party_test.py (standalone, uses websockets lib). Register requires either email or mobile; login identifier accepts email/username/mobile. Party WS URL: wss://<host>/api/ws/party/{pid}?token=<jwt>. All feature flows (auth, songs stream w/ range, like/save/history, friends request+accept, party create/join/queue/chat, admin upload/delete, non-admin 403) verified passing.
